title: Prevent Highly Complex Expressions
description: The complexity of an expression, defined by the number of &&, || and condition ? ifTrue : ifFalse operators it contains, should not be too high to maintain readability of the code.
recommendation: Refactor the complex expressions into simpler, more readable ones. For example, instead of having several conditions in a single if statement, break them down into multiple if statements or use functions to encapsulate the complexity.
impact: Highly complex expressions can make the code difficult to read, understand, and maintain, leading to potential bugs and security vulnerabilities.

checks.message: Expression is too complex; refactor into simpler expressions
